changes.description: Rewrote verbose 570-line original skill as a focused 110-line version. Removed SQL, visualization, report template, and statistical analysis sections irrelevant to CSV tasks. Added explicit step-by-step instructions for pivot/aggregation (per-row revenue computation) and data cleaning (unique-row counting rules, date format recognition, empty-vs-invalid email distinction). Included Python code patterns for CSV reading, dedup, and issue counting. Removed unreferenced files (scripts/, WA_Fn-UseC_-Telco-Customer-Churn.csv).
